sources.licenseNote: User-owned local generation history, PNG metadata, or manually imported prompt files. Do not commit imported records.
sources.adultPolicy: inherits source metadata; keep adult_level on every record

sources.licenseNote: Use the public API only. Store image generation metadata and provenance; do not scrape HTML pages or store image bytes.
sources.adultPolicy: default nsfw=false; preserve nsfwLevel/adult flags when imported

sources.licenseNote: Use the public API only. Store image generation metadata and provenance; do not scrape HTML pages or store image bytes.
sources.adultPolicy: preserve nsfwLevel/adult flags; adult-leaning tags may be promoted with adult_level metadata

sources.licenseNote: Fetch only allow-listed public prompt pages. Store staging provenance and parsed tag candidates; do not commit raw page text or image bytes.
sources.adultPolicy: preserve adult_level on candidates; do not exclude adult-leaning terms during promotion

sources.licenseNote: CC0 dataset candidate. Import text metadata columns only after explicit user action; avoid downloading image archives.
sources.adultPolicy: requires dataset-level filtering and review before promotion

sources.licenseNote: Use documented public JSON endpoints for tag vocabulary evidence only. Store no image bytes and do not commit raw post tag strings.
sources.adultPolicy: collect adult-leaning vocabulary evidence from explicit/questionable public metadata; preserve adult_level during promotion

sources.licenseNote: Use public JSON tag metadata endpoints for vocabulary evidence. Store no image bytes and no raw post prompt dumps.
sources.adultPolicy: mark sensitive categories and adult_level during promotion

sources.licenseNote: Disabled for MVP because current terms prohibit automated retrieval or indexing of site contents except public search engines.
